_comment: Domain-neutral mount manifest (§7 residence). The CORE loops over these entries and mounts each generically — it never interprets the names. All domain vocabulary (what an 'asset' is, how to describe it) lives HERE, in data, or in lens-space.

mounts.name: assets
mounts.title: Equipment registry
mounts.description: Every tagged piece of equipment on the platform — compressors, pumps, valves — with its place in the plant hierarchy.
mounts.origin: Cognite CDF (Valhall platform) · via skill obtain-oid

mounts.name: timeseries
mounts.title: Sensor catalogue
mounts.description: The live instruments: temperature, pressure, flow and more, each linked to the equipment it measures.
mounts.origin: Cognite CDF (Valhall platform) · via skill obtain-oid

mounts.name: events
mounts.title: Maintenance history
mounts.description: Work orders and maintenance events, each tied to the equipment it touched.
mounts.origin: Cognite CDF (Valhall platform) · via skill obtain-oid

mounts.name: documents
mounts.title: Drawings & documents
mounts.description: P&IDs, technical drawings and training material for the platform.
mounts.origin: Cognite CDF (Valhall platform) · via skill obtain-oid
